name: pi-island
description: macOS Dynamic-Island-style status capsule for the pi coding agent. Shows what pi is doing in real time, at the very top of your screen — with native notch-wrap support for MacBooks.

scripts.dev:unlink: npm unlink -g pi-island && npm i -g pi-island && node scripts/dev-status.mjs
scripts.release:beta: node scripts/bump-version.mjs beta && git add -A && git commit -m 'chore: release v'$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git tag v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git push --follow-tags && echo 'beta tag pushed -- CI will publish to npm with --tag beta'
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -m 'chore: release v%s' && git push --follow-tags && echo '✓ tag pushed — GitHub Actions (.github/workflows/publish.yml) will publish to npm'
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -m 'chore: release v%s' && git push --follow-tags && echo '✓ tag pushed — GitHub Actions (.github/workflows/publish.yml) will publish to npm'
scripts.release:major: npm version major -m 'chore: release v%s' && git push --follow-tags && echo '✓ tag pushed — GitHub Actions (.github/workflows/publish.yml) will publish to npm'

author: phun333
